storyInfo: Saria bargains with the government, using the completed 'tree' as chip, saving Propeller Paradise and lifting the restrictions placed on Rhine since the Trimounts incident. The leaders of Rhine meet up for the first time in a while, reporting their findings and setting the tone for research in the new era.

attributes.content: A most remarkable speech, Mr. Vice President.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: People were moved to tears, even in the Rhine lounge.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: I didn't think I would move the most eccentric, most maverick scientists of Columbia.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: But I've received enough flowers, banners, strongly worded letters of support, and soldier figures painted in my likeness over the last few hours.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: Not from Rhine.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: ...For the better, I suppose. Let's get back to the topic at hand.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: How should we define that 'tree' floating in the sky, from a scientific perspective?
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: If you really want to know the scientific principles behind it, I could spend the whole afternoon explaining how its roots will spread across the land, and its branches and leaves across the sky.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: From a scientific perspective, however, all you need to know is that when it is fully grown, it will be able to collect energy and information from across Columbia and process it centrally.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: You mean... an energy well like the S.H.A.F.T., but on a national scale?
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: And a server, too. Bidirectional, to boot.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: The roots and branches go both ways—not only from the ground to the sky, but also from the sky to the ground.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Haha.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: No need to force yourself to understand these things. You can zone out the way you did when you visited our Trimounts headquarters.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: It was your words that saved the tree when dozens of guns from the Department of Defense and hundreds of cameras from Maylander media were pointed at it.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Miss Wilson's words truly tugged at the heartstrings. Even an old man like me couldn't help but think back to the wild days of youth.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: I see.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: And there I was, thinking that it was because you didn't want to give away the chance to define this tree to Maylander or the Department of Defense.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: An exhibition, a speech, Sky Fever and patriotism have made you the overwhelming darling of public opinion over the other candidates, in the span of just a few hours.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: But have you thought about the future you would need to paint, in order to not let your supporters down?
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Or was it always your plan to improvise your speech?
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: You know about the understanding between Kristen and the Department of Defense. Kristen would build Arc-01, and it was none of Rhine's business who the DOD used it against.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: Since I already have the authority to define this tree, I don't suppose it would have broken through the Starpod before everyone's eyes, if I didn't discuss with Rhine when defining it?
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: Of course you don't have to discuss with anyone, be it Nasti, myself, the generals, the lawmakers, or that plushie on your shoulder.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: ...Hehe.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: I take back what I said about you when I was chatting with my secretary.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: What do you mean?
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: You're easier to deal with than Kristen.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: State your demands.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: Lift the lockdown on Propeller Paradise and allow the escaped plate to return to the capital's route for repairs. As to those involved in the incident...
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: 'Escaped'? That's not how D.C. will define what has happened.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: Researchers who stand on the front lines of Columbian science would never flee in the face of foreign sabotage, would they?
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: What else?
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: Lift the lockdown on Rhine Lab... you know what I'm talking about.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: You and I should hold an official meeting as soon as possible. You can't ask the government to undo something we haven't done. We've only ever been curious...
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: What can Rhine Lab do?
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: Seriously, is no one sleeping tonight? I should have held some night wilderness tours.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Heh. You just wouldn't stay still, would you, even when the plate's broken down.
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: I could say the same about you. You look like a clerk gazing blankly at the sky outside after coming back from vacation.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Well... I was scared, but also excited, when we started fighting the Maylander people.
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: You almost scared ME when you tried to bite that agent's finger off.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: I'm not really an emotional guy. The last time I was so excited was when I got approved for that Sky Loan.
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: The loan shark was showing off levitating devices at the entrance to the local bar. There were so many people watching that they broke the fence.
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: In the end, it wasn't education or economic circumstances that decided who got the loan, but who could fly a drone the highest and furthest.
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: Which was how you ended up being the sucker who got scammed into it.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: That night, I stupidly bragged to my wife, showing off the finger I used to move the control stick and win a chance for the future...
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: It was only a few days later that you realized there was no battery in the controller at all.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Yeah, I should never trust myself when blood gets into my head.
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: But you still charged the blockade with us without a second thought, didn't you?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Yeah. Now we're like cystybeasts to the slaughter in the wilderness, waiting for the government to decide our future...
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: I feel like an onion thrown into a washing machine, getting layers after layers peeled off in these tides of fevers...
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: Do you want to escape the washing machine, or do you want to be more than a powerless onion?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Hm...
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: A few years ago, I had an idea while going into the Bleached Wasteland for the third time.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: If I sneaked inside with a truckload of pure gold ore, and took it through the border checkpoint in broad daylight...
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Columbians would forget all the terrifying legends in the blink of an eye and begin another Great Expansion, and it wouldn't be much different from what we're going through.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Even if it began with a bored tour guide rather than a scientist who split the sky; even if it was a hoax rather than a milestone.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: We always try to see new possibilities inside the door marked 'impossible', to escape the laws of common sense that seem to have no end, to go somewhere else and live a different life.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: You, me, the hundreds of Propeller Paradise testers, even that Rhine researcher assistant, Sky... we're all the same.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: The onion can't get out of the washing machine...
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: But we can remember why we chose to go inside.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: If the government doesn't hang us all for treason tonight, I want to stay on Propeller Paradise, run Lucky Cystybeast, and pay my debts.
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: Can you deliver a letter to my wife? I don't really trust regular Messengers.
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: Would you like to join Ferne's Tours? I could deliver YOU.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: I don't believe it. There can't be a single scientist on Terra like you.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: (Sound of hammering)
attributes.name: Scientific Consultant?

attributes.content: How did you meet Gustave? Did you know about his and Maylander's plan?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: (Sound of metal being polished)
attributes.name: Scientific Consultant?

attributes.content: Shame I never actually got to teach him a lesson. The old fox ran off with Maylander's people after the levitation layer fell.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: He was taken away in handcuffs.
attributes.name: Scientific Consultant?

attributes.content: Handcuffs? Ha! He wanted me to take the fall for Propeller Paradise, but he's the one who ends up going down!
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: (Sound of metal clanging)
attributes.name: Scientific Consultant?

attributes.content: Good.
attributes.name: Scientific Consultant?

attributes.content: You've been sitting here the whole day with those pliers and hammers... what are you studying?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: I'm preparing for a journey.
attributes.name: Scientific Consultant?

attributes.content: The Kuranta gestures to the bottom of his 'shoes'. Only then does Gordon realize that the sound that the Kuranta makes when walking does not come from shoes.
A piece of crescent-shaped metal... nailed to your feet? Doesn't it hurt?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: No. Feet are more trustworthy than shoes in treacherous terrain, such as the swamps of Sargon, the icefields of Sami, and the barrenlands of Columbia.
attributes.name: Scientific Consultant?

attributes.content: So you don't plan on hiding your identity from me.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: My role is insignificant in this entire event.
attributes.name: Scientific Consultant?

attributes.content: I simply came to help a friend, and made a new friend along the way.
attributes.name: Scientific Consultant?

attributes.content: I do so hate free spirits.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: You have enough experience to be my travel companion. But you won't do it.
attributes.name: Scientific Consultant?

attributes.content: ATAO's gonna be purged after this accident. Why should I not go back when the old fox no longer has any influence?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Besides, you recognized everything in my collection room. I'll always be inferior to you if I traveled with you.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: I'll make good use of all ATAO resources available to me. You won't recognize Five-Four the next time you see it.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: I look forward to it.
attributes.name: Scientific Consultant?

attributes.content: Is there any place you haven't been? Like beyond the Starpod, I guess?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: There are many paths that no one has trodden before.
attributes.name: Scientific Consultant?

attributes.content: If there indeed comes a day when humanity stands among the clouds, I will continue to cast my gaze to the land.
attributes.name: Scientific Consultant?

attributes.content: I saw you coming this time, Mercia.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: It's rare to see you not burying your head in work. Are you waiting for someone?
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: What about you? Your colleagues already pulled out of Propeller Paradise, before the sun had set.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Another rule of secretaries? You have to be the last one to leave?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Just ran into a bit of trouble when packing.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: (Speaks in Sarkaz) Hover.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Oh, thank you. I was wondering how I would get them down there.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Yet you chose the most scenic route, one that would take you around the tree.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: I wanted to see the final resting place of Væla... your mother.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Her epitaph is the leaves that grow upon it.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Look up on your way out. She might have the wind carry one to you, if she still remembers you.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: You're not angry that I used Væla to complete Maylander's mission?
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: You also defied Maylander's orders in order to help her.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: If it's to prison that you go from here, I would not consider it a shining example of Columbian justice.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: No need to worry about that.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: The Tin Man once decorated himself with drone parts that Mr. Selene discarded. Usefulness is not the only standard that he uses to judge.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: And this little rebellion won't be, either.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Mm.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Ah... I think that's the one you were waiting for?
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: I'll take my leave, then.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Give me the parameters, Sky.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Transmission complete. Nothing out of the ordinary. The tree is in great shape.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: But you already know that, don't you?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Just making sure the battle didn't wreck your brain.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: The first thing I learned on the streets of Trimounts was how to fight. I wouldn't be here at Rhine if a fight or two could wreck my brain.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Until I come back, you're in charge of the tree's regular maintenance, any derivative projects, and all our staff, workers and testers in Propeller Paradise.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: I need you on top of your game.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: I got the projects, but the workers and testers... they have been asking what you liked. They wanted to give you a token of their appreciation before you leave.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: They stayed because of you, Director Lunorey.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: What did you tell them?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Uh... I don't know. I have no idea what you like... other than our work.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Take a Starpod Wars stamp to Pitt tomorrow. He'll tell you everyone's personality and interests.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Director...
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: The first thing I learned on the barrenlands was how to deal with people.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: What do you like, then?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: It's not hard to find out.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: It's time to go. I'll leave the tree in your hands.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Huh? What about the one you were waiting for?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: He's used to traveling alone. He's probably already left.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Left? But we're in the barrenlands!
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: He'll find a way.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Hey, stop. This is Rhine Lab HQ. Visitors need to register over there.
attributes.name: Rhine Lab Researcher

attributes.content: I noticed you the moment you walked in. Hard not to, given the clatter you make when walking. Did you just come back from the barrenlands or something? At least change your clothes, if you want to steal company secrets.
attributes.name: Rhine Lab Researcher

attributes.content: What the... director-level access? Who are you?
attributes.name: Rhine Lab Researcher

attributes.content: I-I'm sorry. I'll take you upstairs now. The others are waiting for you in the conference room.
attributes.name: Rhine Lab Researcher

attributes.content: Thank you.
...That's the gist of it. The rest of the details are on the slide.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Propeller Paradise has docked with Max, D.C.. The District will now proceed to perform repairs and take inventory.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Hundreds of tech firms, more than a thousand research projects on the sky and flight, and some twenty to thirty-thousand people... it could take months to complete.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Fortunately, Saria's negotiation with Jackson was a success, and the Rhine Engineering Section will be able to focus on their work at Propeller Paradise.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Sky Jagger is in charge until I get back. He's matured a lot.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Wow, you're actually developing the new guys.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Good work, Nasti.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Thanks for your help... I would thank you even more if you deleted the photos where you make faces with my appearance.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Nah, don't think so.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Say, aren't you gonna tell me about your mom?
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: No.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Something's different about you... not sure what, exactly, but in a good way.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Nasti...
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Alright. I cried, I came to terms with a few things, and strengthened my resolve with a few things. That's all.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Ahem. I didn't leave my lab to watch your little tête-à-tête.
attributes.name: Ferdinand

attributes.content: You've been a little too committed to science lately, Ferdinand. I'm almost starting to miss the days when you were scheming left and right to take over the company.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: And why do you think I'm not doing that?
attributes.name: Ferdinand

attributes.content: I'll ask you to recall that it was MY breakthroughs in high-energy physics that have kept all our sections afloat these past two years, ladies!
attributes.name: Ferdinand

attributes.content: Yes, sure, thank you for your help.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: I'm guessing Dorothy didn't come to the meeting because she didn't want to hear you gloat.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Hmph. She went back to Site 359 right after the inquiry. She said she had a few dreams... girl never looks forward.
attributes.name: Ferdinand

attributes.content: Saria. Nasti's already sent the experiment results concerning the 'tree' to my mailbox. We're not here only to discuss the Propeller Paradise matter, are we?
attributes.name: Ferdinand

attributes.content: Of course not.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Then who are we waiting for?
attributes.name: Ferdinand

attributes.content: Perhaps you might be interested in seeing data from the Infy Icefield?
You're back, Maryam. Finally.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Sorry, it's been a long time since I've been in Columbia. Took me some time to fit my hoof-irons. Broke them in on the walk from D.C. to Trimounts.
attributes.name: Maryam

attributes.content: I'm glad I didn't wait for you on Propeller Paradise. I had a car that could have taken both of us back to Rhine together.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: ...You know, I never considered that at all.
attributes.name: Maryam

attributes.content: Someone obsessed with searching for death in every corner of Terra would be used to working alone. I figured.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: It takes two people with director-level access to activate the core unit of that tree. I had wondered who Saria sent to help Nasti...
attributes.name: Ferdinand

attributes.content: The legend is already a pile of bones in the wilderness. The media questions if the director of Rhine's Scientific Investigation Section even exists. There's definitely no better choice, but—
attributes.name: Ferdinand

attributes.content: You want to know who arranged it? Justin Jr.
attributes.name: Maryam

attributes.content: He had some investments in Čappat, and no sooner had I left the Infy Icefield than he got in touch.
attributes.name: Maryam

attributes.content: He told me to go to Columbia, and straight to D.C.. I got Gustave's invitation soon after... Justin Jr. had obviously, let's just say, pulled a few strings.
attributes.name: Maryam

attributes.content: Then why did you—
attributes.name: Ferdinand

attributes.content: Why did I come back to Rhine? I found a fragment of that spherical superstructure in the depths of the Infy Icefield, where the rootless flowers bloomed the brightest.
attributes.name: Maryam

attributes.content: You guessed it? Yes, it's the structure that Kristen's files mentioned. She said people in the old times called it the Stargate.
attributes.name: Maryam

attributes.content: I'm sure Saria will share the information with you soon. Any more questions, Ferdinand? I thought not.
attributes.name: Maryam

attributes.content: Haha. Nothing's changed about how you ask and answer your own questions, Maryam. You've left Ferdinand with nothing left to say.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Alright, looks like everyone's here.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: This meeting is rather overdue. For the past two years, all of mainstream Columbian media and the tech tabloids have made the same judgment...
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: 'The gap where Galleria Stellaria disappeared is a scar upon the Starpod, and a scar upon Rhine.' They've even come up with a whole narrative on the cancellation of Rhine's end-of-year cocktail party.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: We were all busy, that's all.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Yes, but now we finally have some time.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: The joint project between Engineering and Ecological had some unexpected twists and turns, but the final result was a smashing success. Nasti, you're now holding the key to a brand new domain.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: ...If we can keep it in our hands.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Maryam's discovery in the Infy Icefield has proven beyond all doubt that those strange tales that Kristen collected are, indeed, based on actual fact.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Perhaps it will help us rebuild dialogue with the old era.
attributes.name: Maryam

attributes.content: And Muelsyse has brought back data from our observation station in Kjerag...
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Data that's very interesting... or very dangerous.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: I'm sure you've heard about the events in Bolívar. Twenty science teams have gone missing in the Black Flow.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Explorers and schemers will be excited if there are any developments with that swamp. Rhine should act too, Saria.
attributes.name: Ferdinand

attributes.content: Magallan is already on her way.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: The events and phenomena that have unfolded since Kristen's incident indicate that the most well-hidden secrets of Terra all lead to the same answer.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: It will tell us the reason for Terra's existence, and whether it is a disaster or a brave new 'world' waiting for us in the future.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Rhine Lab has already made preparations, but that alone is not enough. We must respond to the fear of the unknown, and go boldly where no one has gone before...
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: What you said was absolutely correct, Nasti.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: However, Rhine Lab must be the one to turn that key.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: (Mutters) Whoa...
attributes.name: Ferdinand

attributes.content: Of course, we'll have a make-up cocktail party.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: What's this, Justin Jr.?
A newspaper sample. I would like you to think of a title for this article here before it goes to print. Are these scientists gathered to 'Mourn the End of Sky Fever'...?
attributes.name: Justin Jr.

attributes.content: Or preparing to 'Usher in a Tide of New Changes?'
attributes.name: Justin Jr.

attributes.content: You sent a screenshot of your communications with your colleagues to the The Savior?
More appropriate to put it as a DOD-aligned newspaper getting its hands on certain documents that could not be obtained by official means.
attributes.name: Justin Jr.

attributes.content: But I heard your Control has already reached an understanding with Jackson concerning Propeller Paradise.
None too thrilled about it, are you? But it won't stop me from making another deal with you.
attributes.name: Justin Jr.

attributes.content: You understand that, in the aftermath of the Horizon Arc Project, Rhine Lab's credibility with the Department of Defense has become roughly the equivalent of Mama John's scratch-off lottery tickets—garbage.
Which is why I only came to you after Saria reached an understanding with Jackson.
attributes.name: Justin Jr.

attributes.content: In the aftermath of the setback in Bolívar, the failure of the Horizon Arc Project, and the Propeller Paradise incident, the Department of Defense's credibility with President Mark Max has become...
attributes.name: Justin Jr.

attributes.content: Well, I suppose I should spare you the proverbs.
attributes.name: Justin Jr.

attributes.content: I don't know what exactly our scientists are planning, but I know the value they can create. In this, I'm sure we're in agreement.
attributes.name: Justin Jr.

attributes.content: I'm a businessman, and my priority is Rhine's business interests.
attributes.name: Justin Jr.

attributes.content: Sounds like I have no reason to refuse.
It's a pleasure doing business with you.
attributes.name: Justin Jr.

attributes.content: To be frank with you, I didn't think much of you when Blake recommended you...
Hah. I'm sure you remember my life story that I just shared, which is a fairly interesting one, if I do say so myself...
attributes.name: Justin Jr.

attributes.content: All you need to do is think something of fate. As for your attitude toward the one who controls its pulse—
attributes.name: Justin Jr.

attributes.content: That's rarely in your hands.
attributes.name: Justin Jr.
